description: Attaches a context menu to compose-window address chips (mail-address-pill elements) and fires an event when the user selects the Addy alias action.

events.name: onChipMenuClicked
events.description: Fires when the user selects 'Replace with Addy alias' from the right-click menu on a compose-window address chip.

email.description: The email address of the chip that was right-clicked.

displayName.description: The display name of the chip, if any.

fieldType.description: Which field the chip is in: 'to', 'cc', or 'bcc'.
